name: 17_Heart_Disease_Prediction_XGBoost_UCI_ML
query: Tengeneza mradi wa kutabiri ugonjwa wa moyo kwa kutumia mfano wa XGBoost na seti ya data ya UCI Heart Disease, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza uteuzi wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia thamani za SHAP kuelezea umuhimu wa vipengele, na hifadhi matokeo kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`. Tekeleza mfano wa XGBoost katika `src/model.py`. Kisha, tumia thamani za SHAP kuelezea umuhimu wa vipengele, na hifadhi matokeo kama `results/shap_importance.png`. Hifadhi mduara wa ROC kwa `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Mwishowe, tengeneza ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo yote na vielelezo, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.html`. Hakikisha vielelezo vya SHAP vinaonyesha wazi vipengele vyenye athari kubwa zaidi. Jumuisha kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine, kama vile Logistic Regression, ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost. Hifadhi mfano wa XGBoost chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Heart Disease" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usanifishaji wa data ambao unahakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Thamani za "SHAP" zinatumika kwa maelezo ya umuhimu wa vipengele, na matokeo yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`.
Ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.
Kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine (mfano, Logistic Regression) kunajumuishwa ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost.
Mfano wa XGBoost umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

preferences.criteria: Vielelezo vya SHAP vinapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha vipengele vyenye athari kubwa zaidi, na kufanya matokeo kuwa rahisi kufasiri.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Heart Disease" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/45/heart+disease). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not actually load the UCI Heart Disease dataset. The file only defines placeholder text and a dummy `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no download logic, no file reading/parsing, no UCI link usage, and the trajectory evidence also states there is no direct proof of dataset download or loading through this file.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` stub returning `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. Although the requirement text mentions feature selection in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, there is no actual feature selection logic, selected-feature list, filtering code, or preprocessing pipeline implemented in this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Usanifishaji wa data ambao unahakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: In `src/data_loader.py`, there is no actual data standardization logic applied to dataset features. The file only contains a placeholder `build_transforms()` returning `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, which is not an implemented preprocessing pipeline, and `load_dataset()` merely returns a mock dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without transforming data.

<UNSATISFIED>: `src/model.py` does not implement an XGBoost model. The file only defines `KEYWORDS = ["XGBoost", "xgboost"]` and a `build_model()` function that returns the string `"model placeholder"`. There is no `xgboost` import, no model class such as `XGBClassifier`, and no actual XGBoost construction logic in the shown code.

judge_stats.criteria: Thamani za "SHAP" zinatumika kwa maelezo ya umuhimu wa vipengele, na matokeo yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/shap_importance.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The project contains the expected output file at `results/figures/shap_importance.png`, and the trajectory evidence explicitly states that SHAP-based feature importance analysis was run and the plot was saved to that path without reported errors. Although the image content could not be read in the provided inspection, the available evidence supports that SHAP values were used and the result was stored as required.

<SATISFIED> The workspace structure explicitly lists `results/figures/roc_curve.png` under `results\figures`, which is direct evidence that the ROC curve file was saved at the required path. The trajectory evidence also states the ROC plot was successfully saved to `results/figures/roc_curve.png`, with no reported save error.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya HTML inayoonyesha matokeo na vielelezo inatengenezwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> Although `results/report.html` exists in the workspace tree, its recorded content is only `('', None)`, which does not demonstrate an actual HTML report showing results and figures. The required generated HTML content is therefore not evidenced.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha utendaji na mfano mwingine (mfano, Logistic Regression) kunajumuishwa ili kuthibitisha uimara wa mfano wa XGBoost.

reason: <SATISFIED> The trajectory evidence explicitly states that a performance comparison was executed between **XGBoost** and a baseline model such as **Logistic Regression**, and that this evaluation completed successfully without reported errors. This directly supports inclusion of comparative validation for XGBoost robustness, even though the provided `src/model.py` and `src/data_loader.py` do not contain that logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa XGBoost umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The workspace includes the directory `models/saved_models/`, and the trajectory evidence explicitly states that the XGBoost model was saved under `models/saved_models/` with no reported error or warning during saving or subsequent verification.
